hero.title: Status stranica bez komplikacija
hero.subtitle: No monitors to configure. No integrations to wire up. Create a simple status page, update component statuses from a single dashboard, and keep your users informed with context-rich notes that automatically create incident history.

benefits.title: Sve što vam treba, ništa što vam ne treba
benefits.subtitle: Recite korisnicima šta se dešava bez podešavanja ijednog monitora.

launch.title: Pokrenite se za nekoliko minuta
launch.description: Kreirajte status stranicu, dodajte svoje servise kao komponente i podelite link. Bez monitora, bez agenata i bez dodatne infrastrukture.

upgrade.title: Nadogradite kada budete spremni
upgrade.description: Počnite jednostavno, a zatim dodajte automatski monitoring dostupnosti, prilagođene domene, branding i upravljanje incidentima kako vaš proizvod raste.

dashboard.title: One-screen control panel
dashboard.description: The Simple Dashboard puts everything in one place — component statuses, active incidents, and quick updates. No navigating around, no settings pages.

notes.title: Add context with notes
notes.description: When changing a component's status, add an optional note (e.g. "Investigating elevated error rates"). It shows publicly next to the component — and automatically creates an incident record.

notifications.title: Subscribers notified automatically
notifications.description: When you add a note to a status change, your page's subscribers are notified automatically — no separate incident to create, no extra steps.

history.title: 90-day reported history
history.description: Every component shows a 90-day strip of reported status — green for operational days, coloured ticks for incidents, overrides, or maintenance. A transparent record for your users.

use_cases.title: Ko koristi jednostavne status stranice?
use_cases.subtitle: Svaki tim koji želi da komunicira stanje servisa bez automatizacije.

startups.title: Startapi u ranom pristupu
startups.description: Imate nekoliko ranih korisnika i želite da pokažete da ozbiljno shvatate pouzdanost, ali još niste spremni da ulažete u punu monitoring infrastrukturu.
startups.point_1: Dodajte komponente za svoj API, kontrolnu tablu i auth servis
startups.point_2: Update status with a note from the dashboard during incidents
startups.point_3: Podelite URL u podnožju svoje aplikacije

internal.title: Interni alati i admin paneli
internal.description: Vaši interni sistemi nisu javni, ali vaš tim i dalje mora da zna kada je nešto pokvareno ili na održavanju.
internal.point_2: Postavite status održavanja pre planiranog zastoja
internal.point_3: Podelite je sa timom na Slacku

indie.title: Indie makeri i sporedni projekti
indie.description: Vodite solo projekat i želite profesionalnu status stranicu bez plaćanja monitoringa koji vam još nije potreban.
indie.point_3: Izgleda odlično i gradi poverenje korisnika

how_it_works.title: Tri koraka do aktivne status stranice
how_it_works.subtitle: Bez vodiča. Bez tehničkog podešavanja. Samo popunite osnove.

step_1.title: Kreirajte svoju status stranicu
step_1.description: Izaberite "Jednostavna status stranica" kada pravite novu stranicu. Dajte joj ime i odmah je spremna.

step_2.title: Dodajte svoje komponente
step_2.description: Dodajte servise, API-je ili funkcije koje želite da pratite - na primer "API", "Kontrolna tabla" ili "Auth". Svaki postaje red na vašoj javnoj stranici.

step_3.title: Update from your dashboard
step_3.description: When something changes, open the Simple Dashboard, pick a status and add an optional note. Your public page updates instantly — and subscribers are notified if you included a note.

statuses.title: Pet statusa, jasno prikazanih
statuses.subtitle: Svaka komponenta na vašoj stranici može imati jedan od pet statusa koje posetioci odmah razumeju, bez žargona i nejasnoća.

degraded.label: Usporeno
degraded.description: Radi, ali sporije ili delimično neispravno

cta.title: Spremni da korisnike držite u toku?
cta.subtitle: Kreirajte besplatnu jednostavnu status stranicu za manje od dva minuta. Kreditna kartica nije potrebna.

dashboard_feature.title: Update status in two clicks
dashboard_feature.description: The Simple Dashboard is your home base for the page. Every component is listed with its current status and note. Click edit, pick a state, optionally add a note, and save — done.
dashboard_feature.illustration_label: Simple Dashboard — everything in one screen
dashboard_feature.point_1: See all component statuses and active incidents at a glance
dashboard_feature.point_2: Pin it as your default landing page for instant access after login
dashboard_feature.point_3: No navigating around settings — everything is right there

notes_feature.title: One note does three things
notes_feature.description: When you add a note alongside a status change (e.g. "Investigating elevated error rates"), the platform automatically shows it next to the component on your public page, creates an incident record in your history, and notifies subscribers — all from a single form.
notes_feature.illustration_label: Notes shown publicly · Incident created automatically
notes_feature.point_1: Note appears inline on the public status page
notes_feature.point_2: Incident entry created automatically — no separate step
notes_feature.point_3: Subscribers notified without opening the incident management flow
notes_feature.point_4: Incident auto-resolves when you reset the component to Operational
